/usr/bin/c++ -pthread -Wno-enum-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/SpectrometerExample.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerExample.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerExample.dir/qcustomgraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerExample.dir/moc_mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerExample.dir/moc_QTableWidgetDeviceItem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpectrometerExample.dir/moc_qcustomgraph.cpp.o -o SpectrometerExample  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kobepp/MCAs/kromek/libs/linux64/release /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 ../libs/linux64/release/libSpectrometerDriver.so ../libs/linux64/release/libKromekDriver.a -Wl,-Bstatic -lrt -Wl,-Bdynamic -ludev /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
